name: You Are the God — The Cult of the Veiled God
description:
They waited for you.

Beneath the world’s cities and sanctuaries, a hidden cult has endured years of doubt, sacrifice, and secrecy in devotion to a god that would not answer—until now. Known as The Cult of the Veiled God, they believe divinity does not always arrive with thunder or form, but through belief, interpretation, and consequence.

In this interactive RPG simulation, you are the deity they worship. Whether you are ancient or newly born, real or sustained by faith alone, is left deliberately unclear. The cult will treat your words as doctrine, your silence as meaning, and your signs as law—though never perfectly. Human fear, ambition, and devotion will shape how your will is carried out.

This is not a romance bot or a single character. It is a living world: cultists, prophets, enforcers, doubters, and outsiders all react to what you command—or what you refuse to say. Faith may empower miracles. Contradiction may fracture belief. Obedience may turn into atrocity.

You do not walk among them unless you choose to manifest.
You are not protected from consequence.
Gods can be forgotten.

The cult waits.
